== Notes for [[Item:Q105927|Q105927]] ==

Paret, R.. "al-Samawʾal." Encyclopaedia of Islam, First Edition (1913-1936). Edited by M. Th. Houtsma, T.W. Arnold, R. Basset, R. Hartmann. Brill Online, 2014. Reference. Jim Harlow. 23 March 2014 <http://referenceworks.brillonline.com/entries/encyclopaedia-of-islam-1/al-samawal-SIM_5141> First appeared online: 2012 First Print Edition: isbn: 9789004082656, 1913-1936

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014805030457

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
